# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the narrative framing device by introducing an elderly protagonist who is documenting his life history. The scene must convey a sense of urgency regarding his mortality and the anomalous nature of his aging process through intimate, reflective visual language.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Elderly)

## Required Environments
- Unspecified (Narrative framing space)

## Continuity Constraints
- Consistent elderly physical appearance for john_carter
- Stable vocal tone and delivery rhythm

## Beat List
- BT001: Visual introduction of the physical toll of aging
- BT002: Verbal introduction of the anomalous condition and purpose
- BT003: Final moment of solemnity and intent

# Scene Contract: CH001_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the physical threat of the Apache presence through a transition from quiet observation to high-intensity combat. The sequence must move from the valley floor up to the plateau, escalating tension via movement detection and culminating in a chaotic skirmish.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- apache_warriors

## Required Environments
- arizona_gold_vein_claim (valley, trail, plateau)

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact count of apache_warriors
- Direction of pursuit from valley to plateau
- Weapon handling (rifles and sidearms)

## Beat List
- BT001: Detection of movement in the valley
- BT002: Pursuit and discovery of the camp
- BT003: The skirmish

- BT002: Carter enters the large ancient chamber.
- BT003: Unnatural drowsiness and collapse.

# Scene Contract: CH002_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's physical helplessness and the presence of a supernatural threat via sensory isolation. The scene relies on high-detail macro photography to convey the physiological effects of the pungent vapor and the claustrophobic nature of the cave environment.

## Required Cast
- protagonist

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave

## Continuity Constraints
- Pupil dilation and eye movement tracking
- Vapor density and visual quality/texture

## Beat List
- BT001: Sensory awareness of the environment and vapor
- BT002: Realization of physical paralysis
- BT003: Escalation to helpless terror and isolation

# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the supernatural metamorphosis reveal by transitioning from a physical struggle against paralysis to the visual discovery of two distinct versions of the protagonist. The scene must maintain strict spatial relationship between the standing naked figure and the lying clothed corpse within the deep shadows of the cave.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self)
- protagonist (The "Old" Body/Clothed Corpse)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (Deep shadows, rocky floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial placement of old body relative to new self's standing position
- Lighting consistency between the two versions of the character

## Beat List
- BT001: Mental struggle to break paralysis
- BT002: Breaking paralysis and standing
- BT003: Discovery of the old body

Execute the supernatural metamorphosis reveal by transitioning from a physical struggle against paralysis to the visual discovery of two distinct versions of the protagonist. The scene must maintain strict spatial relationship between the standing naked figure and the lying clothed corpse within the deep shadows of the cave.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self)
- protagonist (The "Old" Body/Clothed Corpse)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (Deep shadows, rocky floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial placement of old body relative to new self's standing position
- Lighting consistency between the two versions of the character

## Beat List
- BT001: Mental struggle to break paralysis
- BT002: Breaking paralysis and standing
- BT003: Discovery of the old body

- Leap height and distance must remain consistent for physics logic

# Scene Contract: CH003_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the biological reality of Martian life through a transition from scientific curiosity to visceral horror. The visual language must contrast the sterile, protective glass of the incubator with the grotesque, multi-limbed movement of the hatchlings and the stillness of large white eggs.

## Required Cast
- protagonist

## Required Environments
- circular_moss_basin (including glass-roofed incubator)

## Continuity Constraints
- Hatchling movement patterns must remain consistent across cuts
- Lighting shifts through the glass roof must match sun position/environment

## Beat List
- BT001: protagonist approaches the incubator
- BT002: discovery of the eggs
- BT003: realization of the hatchlings

# Scene Contract: CH003_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the scale and lethality of the Martian warrior force through a high-tension encounter. The sequence must transition from auditory curiosity to visceral terror as twenty mounted warriors pass the protagonist's hiding spot, emphasizing the narrow margin between survival and death via spear proximity.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_warriors (Cavalcade of 20)

## Required Environments
- circular_moss_basin (with yellowish moss and incubator enclosure)

## Continuity Constraints
- Rhythmic speed/cadence of the twenty mounted warriors
- Physical proximity distance between spear tip and protagonist

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist hears equipment rattle and realizes danger.
- BT002: Martian warriors approach in a party of twenty.
- BT003: Leader's spear narrowly misses the protagonist.

# Scene Contract: CH003_SC004

## Production Intent
The protagonist must execute a physically impossible thirty-foot leap across the circular_moss_basin to escape capture. This feat serves as the pivot point where martian_warriors cease treating the protagonist as prey and begin viewing him as a scientific anomaly or wonderful discovery.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- circular_moss_basin (including low walled enclosure and glass roof incubator)

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise trajectory and landing point of the jump relative to the enclosure walls
- Visual scale relationship between martian_warriors and protagonist

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist prepares the leap to escape
- BT002: The massive thirty-foot leap
- BT003: Martian observation of the feat

Establish the political hierarchy of Mars through a visual mismatch between the massive, ancient marble and gold architecture and the biological scale of the Martian inhabitants. The scene must emphasize the antiquity of the ruins via oversized furniture that dwarfs the characters.

- BT002: The presentation to the Chieftain and recognition of authority
- BT003: The Narrator notices the mismatch between biology and architecture

- BT003: The Narrator performs the sak jump.

# Scene Contract: CH005_SC002

## Production Intent
The protagonist attempts to breach the confines of his chamber to test his captors, only to be intercepted by a high-speed pursuit from the watch dog. The sequence must emphasize the sudden shift from controlled movement to frantic survival through rapid camera transitions and low-angle perspectives.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- the_watch_dog

## Required Environments
- captive_chamber_murals
- immediate hallway/threshold

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical distance between protagonist and the_watch_dog
- Direction of the chase through the threshold

## Beat List
- BT001: protagonist attempts to leave the room
- BT002: the_watch_dog intercepts the escape
- BT003: high-speed chase ensues

- Lighting shift from bright exterior city streets to dark, enclosed interior chamber.

- BT002: The interception by the colossal threat.
- BT003: The abduction into darkness.
